mapper.select: SELECT graph_id, resource_id, graph_json, generate_status, error_message, ai_model, token_usage, generate_time, ctime, mtime, deleted FROM resource_character_graph WHERE resource_id = #{resourceId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT graph_id, resource_id, graph_json, generate_status, error_message, ai_model, token_usage, generate_time, ctime, mtime, deleted FROM resource_character_graph WHERE graph_id = #{graphId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resource_character_graph ( graph_id, resource_id, graph_json, generate_status, error_message, ai_model, token_usage, generate_time, ctime, mtime, deleted ) VALUES ( #{graphId}, #{resourceId}, #{graphJson}, #{generateStatus}, #{errorMessage}, #{aiModel}, #{tokenUsage}, #{generateTime}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE resource_character_graph
graph_json = #{graphJson}, generate_status = #{generateStatus}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, ai_model = #{aiModel}, token_usage = #{tokenUsage}, generate_time = #{generateTime}, mtime = NOW()
WHERE graph_id = #{graphId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE resource_character_graph SET deleted = 1, mtime = NOW() WHERE graph_id = #{graphId} AND deleted = 0
